# sys11dbaas_postgresql_regions (Data Source)

Fetches the list of available regions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sys11dbaas_postgresql_regions" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) List of regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `default` (Boolean) In case this region is the default, this field is true.
- `description` (String) Description of the region.
- `id` (String) Textual identifier of the region.
